experiment_card.research_question: Can a chunked/source-grounded LLM method improve source-span precision from broad segment references to tighter source-span hints while keeping the narrowed output contract complete and parseable?
experiment_card.hypothesis: On the same source excerpt and benchmark as long_context_judgment_live_pilot_001 and chunked_source_grounding_live_pilot_002, DeepSeek V4 Pro plus a source-span precision contract may reduce broad segment references into tighter source-span hints while preserving the narrowed output contract.
experiment_card.evaluation_plan: Validate this proposed ExperimentCard and MethodCard against protocol schemas. After a separately authorized live run, create proposal-only export records and evaluate source-span precision, honest exact/approximate/broad/missing support labels, unsupported claims, parseability, output-contract fit, and comparison value against chunked_source_grounding_live_pilot_002 and long_context_judgment_live_pilot_001. Method quality, trading validity, product readiness, strategy evidence, graduation, and architecture are not evaluated by this planning packet.
